status_line: Midday on pitch day. SARAH just cracked open the Downloads folder — Run 70 resolved the persistent mount blocker using osascript, scanned all 9 items, came up clean. SCOUT's morning sweep is still clear. ATLAS runs at 1 PM. The three things JARVIS can't do for you: send the Glossier note, close LA Galaxy before Saturday, and deliver today's pitch. Those are on you.
